explanations.14: This mounts a cache directory so package downloads persist between builds, making rebuilds faster.
explanations.15: The 'set -e -x' makes the script exit on any error and print each command before running it, which helps catch problems.
explanations.37: This re-declares the ARG from line 6 so it's available in this later build stage; ARGs don't automatically carry forward.
explanations.42: The '-o' flag allows creating a group with a GID that might already exist, which prevents errors if the ID is taken.
